// Keys: Skeleton key WCID map is in PatchClass.EnsureKeyMap: SIK doors <=1000, SSK chests <=1000, MFK doors <=5000, LEG chests <=5000.
// UseLockpickPathForSkeletonKeys: When true, skeleton keys use the lockpick unlock (very high effective skill). Pickable locks only; does not replace the door empty-LockCode bypass.
// EnableUnlockChestUsingSkeletonBank: When true: locked chest with no chest-capable skeleton key in inventory can debit SSK (40500) or LEG (41000) bank lines. Props must match LeyLineLedger Items[].Prop for SSK/LEG.
// LegendaryChestWcids: Bank fallback: debit LEG line for these WCIDs when resist-based debit did not apply.
// ManaForgeChestWcids: Bank fallback: debit LEG line for these WCIDs.
// SturdySteelChestWcids: Bank fallback: debit SSK line for these WCIDs.
// SturdyIronChestWcids: Bank fallback: debit SSK line for these WCIDs.
// SuppressImmediateChestOpenAfterSkelet: When true: first Chest.Open within the time window after a skeleton key or bank unlock is skipped (client follow-up use). Set false for stock ACE behavior (unlock opens UI immediately).
// SuppressImmediateChestOpenWindowMs: Milliseconds after unlock in which the first matching chest Open is suppressed; increase if the client is slow.
